config.script:
'CExcel #include "50201"
class CExcelContext public pExcel public y
private sub class_initialize() set pExcel=new CExcel y=1 end sub
public function InitExcel() InitExcel=pExcel.NewExcel() end function
public sub increment() y = y + 1 end sub
end class
function create_offer_Excel( byref pConfigurator ):create_offer_Excel = false
dim pExcelContext
set pExcelContext=new CExcelContext
if (not pExcelContext.InitExcel()) then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Nie udało się utworzenie obiektu aplikacji MS Excel." exit function end if
Raport_Begin pConfigurator , pExcelContext
end function
function Raport_Begin(byref pContainer, byref pExcelContext )
'skladamy zapytanie pContainer.begin_process
dim nVisibleColumns:nVisibleColumns = 0
' pExcelContext.pExcel.InsertValueXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, "ala ma kota" ' pExcelContext.pExcel.CenterXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y ' pExcelContext.pExcel.SetTextColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(255,255,255) ' pExcelContext.pExcel.SetBkgColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(0,0,0) ' pExcelContext.pExcel.MakeBoldXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, true ' ' nVisibleColumns = nVisibleColumns + 1 ' pExcelContext.increment ' ' pExcelContext.pExcel.InsertValueXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, "ala ma kota" ' pExcelContext.pExcel.CenterXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y ' pExcelContext.pExcel.SetTextColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(255,255,255) ' pExcelContext.pExcel.SetBkgColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(0,0,0) ' pExcelContext.pExcel.MakeBoldXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, true '
pExcelContext.increment
dim iter while pContainer.get_next_row
'kolejny wiersz pExcelContext.increment nVisibleColumns = 0
for iter = 0 to pContainer.m_pFieldsArray.UpperIndex() pExcelContext.pExcel.InsertValueXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, pContainer.m_pFieldsArray.value(iter) if pContainer.grupa then pExcelContext.pExcel.CenterXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y pExcelContext.pExcel.SetTextColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(255,255,255) pExcelContext.pExcel.SetBkgColor nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, RGB(0,0,0) pExcelContext.pExcel.MakeBoldXY nVisibleColumns+1, pExcelContext.y, true end if nVisibleColumns = nVisibleColumns + 1 next wend
'exit function
dim strTempFileName:strTempFileName = "c:\oferta.xls"
pExcelContext.pExcel.MakeWholeFrame pExcelContext.pExcel.AutoFitWhole
'zapisz wyniki pExcelContext.pExcel.SetFileName strTempFileName
pExcelContext.pExcel.ManualSave pExcelContext.pExcel.Save
'user musi reczeni zamknac Excela - obiekt 'nie jest niszczony pExcelContext.pExcel.ManualClose 'show pExcelContext.pExcel.Maximize
set pExcelContext=nothing
end function
